items.prompt: During EDA, missing data should be:
choices: Detected and documented, then repaired via Chapter 5
items.explain: Section 6.4 emphasizes detection then routed repair.

items.prompt: Example 6.8 illustrates inconsistent city labels found via frequency exploration.
items.explain: Geographic label conflicts surface in value counts.

items.prompt: Class imbalance is commonly detected with:
choices: Bar charts or class distribution tables
Only pie charts of file sizes
items.explain: Section 6.4 links imbalance detection to distribution views.
